output.sparql:
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?player ?goals WHERE {
  wd:Q1446672 p:P154 ?membershipStatement .
  ?membershipStatement ps:P154 ?player .
  ?membershipStatement pq:P585 ?membershipDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?membershipDate) = 2018)
  .
  ?player p:P1600 ?goalStatement .
  ?goalStatement ps:P1600 ?goals .
  ?goalStatement pq:P585 ?goalDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?goalDate) = 2018)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?goals)
LIMIT 1
